candidates.why: Best direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback label across years.

variables.notes: Use as priority list, not sum. 'Revenue' is the cleanest top-line label; 'Total Revenue' is a duplicate fallback.

candidates.why: Best match for direct cost/cost of sales subtotal; includes materials and external services used in delivery.
Component of direct costs, but incomplete versus broader cost subtotal.
Balancing row and explicitly excluded by rules.

variables.notes: Selected the direct-cost subtotal rather than partial components.

candidates.why: Major operating overhead/personnel cost bucket above EBIT.

candidates.row_label: Share-based incentive schemes implemented as shares
candidates.why: Share-based compensation is an SG&A-type overhead component and should be included when separately disclosed.
Core overhead bucket above EBIT; likely captures administrative and other SG&A items.
Explicit SG&A component for some years; include for coverage where separately disclosed.
Appears within 'Materials and services' direct-cost bucket, so better treated as COGS-related than SG&A.
Also appears nested under direct-cost 'Materials and services' bucket, so likely COGS-related.
Label matches SG&A semantically, but preview is empty and less reliable than populated operating expense rows.

final_choice.row_label: Share-based incentive schemes implemented as shares

variables.notes: No single fully explicit SG&A total is present. Chosen rows are overhead components above EBIT. Excluded 'External services...' because they sit under 'Materials and services' and look COGS-related. No separate R&D expense line was identified to add here.

candidates.why: Development-related but is amortization, not current-period R&D expense; excluded by rule.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated income-statement research/development expense line is present. Development-cost amortization is D&A, not XRD.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities carried at amortised cost
candidates.why: Direct recurring borrowing interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Direct recurring lease-interest component below EBIT.
Recurring finance-cost bucket; include because no indication it is entirely non-recurring and it sits within finance expenses.
Total finance-expense line, but avoid because granular components exist.
Financing-related, but presented below net income/preferred adjustments rather than in recurring pretax finance costs; exclude.
Above-EBIT row with a different sign/presentation; likely reporting artifact, so not used alongside cleaner below-EBIT lease-interest row.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities carried at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded total 'Financial expenses' to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best book-equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests, per rule.
Broader equity line including NCI; only fallback if owner equity were absent.
Single equity component, not total book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-owner equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet minority interest / NCI line.
Equivalent alternative label; useful as fallback across years.
Income statement profit attribution, not balance-sheet MIB stock.
Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Use as priority list for balance-sheet NCI/minority equity.
